---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## API Design (if applicable)

If your feature involves new components or APIs, show what you'd like the API to look like:

```tsx
// Example usage of your proposed feature
<ProposedComponent prop1="value" prop2={123}>
  Content
</ProposedComponent>
```

## Use Case

Describe a specific use case for this feature. How would it be used in a real application?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can provide feedback and review
